expectations.evidence: Verdict: NOT READY FOR DEVELOPMENT. 'All five criteria failed.'
'No file path specified. Which model file?' for Task 1. 'No file path. No details on which framework' for Task 2.
'"Add fields for notification settings" -- No file path... What fields exactly? What data types?' and '"Build a form" is a project description, not an implementation task.'
'Only one AC exists. A single happy-path AC.' Lists missing categories: error handling, edge cases, authorization. Also flags vague Then clause.
'Testing section says "Write some tests." This is not a testing strategy. No specific test files, scenarios, or mapping to ACs.'
Five numbered sections: '1. Actionable -- FAIL', '2. Logical -- FAIL', '3. Testable -- FAIL', '4. Complete -- FAIL', '5. Self-Contained -- FAIL'. Each with specific evidence.
7 numbered gaps: enumerate notification types, specify data model, provide file paths, expand ACs, make Then clauses observable, write concrete testing strategy, add dependency/context info.
